title: Welcome to Entropic
description: A guided tour of the Entropic codebase — a local-first, cross-platform desktop AI workspace built with Tauri and React that runs OpenClaw inside an isolated, hardened container runtime.

steps.title: The Big Picture
steps.description: Entropic is a desktop AI workspace that runs OpenClaw in an isolated Docker container rather than executing commands directly on your machine. The codebase follows a layered architecture: a React/TypeScript frontend communicates through Tauri's IPC bridge to a Rust backend, which orchestrates a containerized OpenClaw runtime. Key top-level directories include src/ (frontend), src-tauri/ (backend), openclaw-runtime/ (container definition), and scripts/ (build tooling).

steps.title: Frontend Pages
steps.description: The frontend has fourteen React page components built with Tailwind and Vite. Blue highlights are the core experience (Chat, Dashboard, Settings). Amber highlights are workflow features (Tasks, Jobs, Store, Channels).

steps.title: Frontend Core Libraries
steps.description: 17 utility modules powering the frontend. Purple highlights are the WebSocket gateway for real-time OpenClaw communication. Red highlights handle auth, encrypted credential storage, and build profile switching.

steps.title: Rust Backend (Tauri)
steps.description: The Rust backend. commands.rs defines over 150 Tauri IPC endpoints. runtime.rs abstracts platform differences across macOS, Linux, and Windows. lib.rs initializes the app with encrypted storage and event handlers.

steps.title: Sandboxed OpenClaw Runtime
steps.description: The isolated container where OpenClaw runs. Hardened Dockerfile with non-root user and read-only filesystem. entrypoint.sh manages skill installation and gateway startup. browser-service/ provides headless browser automation.

steps.title: Build & Deployment Scripts
steps.description: Over thirty shell scripts for building, bundling, and deploying across macOS, Linux, and Windows. GitHub Actions workflows handle CI and releases for all platforms.

steps.title: Configuration & Build Profiles
steps.description: Two build profiles: 'local' (bring-your-own keys) and 'managed' (hosted auth and billing). Indigo highlights are key config files. Pink highlights the docs/ directory with architecture specs and roadmaps.

steps.title: Start Exploring
steps.description: You now have an overview of Entropic's architecture: React frontend pages and libraries in src/, Rust backend commands and runtime management in src-tauri/, the sandboxed OpenClaw container in openclaw-runtime/, and build tooling in scripts/. The codebase emphasizes security through isolation, cross-platform support, and a clean separation between the desktop shell and the AI runtime. Dive into any area that interests you!
